text: Musical attack - attacks entities with a beam attack, dealing a stun effect to them.
Explosion of notes - shoots note bombs in different directions.
Musical relaxation - imposes positive effects and removes some negative ones from the target player, provided that they press SHIFT otherwise.
$(o)Condition:$() Note block, jukebox, or music discs within 16 blocks or in inventory.
Musical Rhythm: +20% damage; 10% chance to apply "Weakness III" for 10 sec.
Harmony: 10% chance to gain "Regeneration II" for 15 sec when hit (once per 90 sec).
